_schema: Phase 0 regression baseline — fill in by running the 18 scenarios in docs/evaluation_plan.md.
_instructions: 1. `make dev` and run the 10 happy-path + edge-case scenarios (docs/evaluation_plan.md sections 'Happy path' and 'Edge cases').
2. `make dev` and run the 8 handoff scenarios (H1–H8).
3. Each session appends turn latencies to logs/latency.jsonl (written by LatencyStartMark/LatencyEndMark in services/receptionist/processors.py).
4. After all scenarios: run `python -m scripts.summarize_latency logs/latency.jsonl` to compute P50/P95; fill the numbers below.
5. STT WER + language-detection accuracy are offline measurements — see docs/evaluation_plan.md sections 'WER measurement' and 'Language detection accuracy'.
6. Commit this file. Phase 1 provider evaluation runs must stay within 20% of these numbers on every metric.
